title: Senior Frontend Developer at FarmERP South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at FarmERP South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FarmERP South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
